patch.value:
## Context
From memory session 2026-06-01: 'SDK first-class importer/exporter registration (pm-7qjk: registerImporter/registerExporter optional 3rd options arg → full command def+flags)'

docs/SDK.md line 478: 'registerImporter(name, importer) and registerExporter(name, exporter) register...'
docs/SDK.md line 493: shows registerImporter with only 2 args
docs/SDK.md line 516: shows registerExporter 'jsonl' with only 2 args

The 3rd options argument (command definition with flags) is not shown in any SDK.md example.

## Acceptance criteria
- SDK.md registerImporter/registerExporter section shows the optional 3rd arg with a command-definition example
- The example includes at minimum: command name, flags, description
- The pm-beads or pm-todos pattern is cited as a first-party reference implementation

## Evidence
docs/SDK.md lines 478-520; docs/examples/starter-extension/index.js lines 160-165 (only 2-arg form); memory note 2026-06-01 pm-7qjk
Add importer/exporter options arg and command-def examples to SDK.md

PR #94 (2026-06-01) added an optional 3rd options argument to registerImporter/registerExporter enabling full command definition with flags. SDK.md has a basic registerImporter/registerExporter section (around line 478-520) but does not show the options arg for command definition, which is the primary use case for first-party packages like pm-beads and pm-todos.

- SDK.md registerImporter/registerExporter section shows the optional 3rd arg with a command-definition example
- The example includes at minimum: command name, flags, description
- The pm-beads or pm-todos pattern is cited as a first-party reference implementation

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Audit 2026-06-07 (docs/CI agent): VERIFIED SATISFIED — docs/SDK.md now has full registerImporter/registerExporter examples with the options object + pm-beads/pm-todos exemplar references. Leaving open for owner to formally close; no code work remains.

value.author: codex-implementation-agent
value.text: Final verification evidence: pnpm build, pnpm typecheck, pnpm contracts:check, pnpm quality:static, pnpm quality:docs-links, pnpm security:scan, pnpm audit --audit-level low, node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (149 files, 2619 tests, 100% statements/branches/functions/lines), pnpm changelog:pm:check, pm health --check-only --summary, pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift, Sentry/telemetry gate (critical=0 high=0 telemetry ok), and isolated temp smoke for command-kit install/echo/list flag/package doctor all passed. Residual validation warning is the known pre-existing 116 older closed items missing resolution fields; history drift is clean.

patch.value: Verified SDK docs include importer/exporter options arg and command definition examples as part of the SDK docs bundle.
SDK docs give package authors practical command and importer/exporter examples.
SDK docs remain linked and validated; this branch also links to the new command-kit exemplar.
SDK importer/exporter options and command definition examples confirmed complete.
